meta-description: Learn about net rental income by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Net rental income
excerpt: The amount someone pays you to use your property, after you subtract the expenses you have for the property. Royalty income includes any payments you get from a patent, a copyright, or some natural resource that you own.
content:
The amount someone pays you to use your property, after you subtract the expenses you have for the property. Royalty income includes any payments you get from a patent, a copyright, or some natural resource that you own.

For more information, see IRS Publication 17, chapter 9.
